message:
test(ftui-extras): improve doom/renderer.rs and canvas_adapters.rs test coverage

Add 29 tests for doom/renderer.rs covering render determinism, enclosed room
column fill, two-room portal traversal, background gradient edge cases (height=1,
odd height, width-only cache invalidation), floor/sky gradient constants, OOB
sector index, sky ceiling suppression, narrow seg t=0.5 fallback, wall pixel
verification, extreme pitch/angle, large dimensions, and more. Also fix
pre-existing test broken by concurrent BSP node addition.

Add 46 tests for canvas_adapters.rs covering plasma gradient segments, lerp
edge cases, gradient interpolation, metaballs fill_frame, non-aligned widths,
cache invalidation, ping_pong boundaries, ensure_active_indices, palette stops,
zero-size painters, and determinism.

Total new: 75 tests (29 renderer + 46 canvas_adapters)

bd-3kjph, bd-3gf5d

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
